_protocol: See PROTOCOL.md for full scaffolding instructions

meta.title: Topic Title
meta.question: What specific, measurable thing are we estimating?
meta.resolution: Observable criterion that resolves the question (must be verifiable by third party)

_design_rules: Each indicator must be OBSERVABLE — actions, not opinions
Each must have a clear fired/not-fired threshold
Every hypothesis needs at least one pro AND one anti indicator
Governor flags unfalsifiable hypotheses as DEGRADED

tier1_critical.desc: Near-certain signal of [outcome]. MUST be observable action, not rhetoric.

anti_indicators.desc: Evidence that would REDUCE H1 probability
Evidence that would REDUCE H2 probability
Evidence that would REDUCE H3 probability
Evidence that would REDUCE H4 probability

actorModel.description: Decision-theoretic framework: who makes the decisions that drive this outcome?

actor1.name: Key Decision Maker
actor1.role: Primary actor whose decisions drive the outcome

methodology: ACTIONS OVER RHETORIC — only verified events move posteriors
TAG EVERYTHING — separate rhetoric from action in evidence log
DON'T FRONT-RUN — set tripwires and let news confirm
SOCIALIZATION DETECTION — recognize narrative prep patterns
